headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Overweight on CoStar Group, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Brett Huff   maintains CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $70 to $50.

headline: Top 3 Real Estate Stocks That Could Lead To Your Biggest Gains This Quarter
summary: The most oversold stocks in real estate sector offer buying opportunity. RSI compares stock strength on up & down days, signals short-term performance.
